HEXAGHOST-BOLSTERING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Bolstering Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-BOLSTERING_GHOSTFLAME.descript:
Ignites by playing a Power while on it. 
You gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] and 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-CRUSHING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Crushing Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-CRUSHING_GHOSTFLAME.descriptio:
Ignites by playing 2 Skills while on it. 
Deals 3 damage to a random enemy twice.
HEXAGHOST-INFERNO_GHOSTFLAME.title: Inferno Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-INFERNO_GHOSTFLAME.description:
Ignites by spending 3 Energy while on it.
Deals 4 damage to a random enemy for each ignited Ghostflame.
If all Ghostflames are Ignited, gain 2 [gold]Intensity[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Searing Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_GHOSTFLAME.description:
Ignites by playing 2 Attacks while on it.
Applies 3 [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to a random enemy twice.
